frames.description: The camera is positioned at a busy urban street corner. To the left is a building with multiple large advertisements. A prominent banner for 'Mount Litera Zee School' advertises admissions, with address details for Kalaburagi. Below it is 'KOMAL CAFE' with its name also in Kannada (ಕೋಮಲ್ ಕೆಫೆ). Several Pepsi posters featuring actor Yash with the tagline 'RISE UP BABY!' are visible. A yellow school bus and traffic lights are present.

The scene is nearly identical to the previous frame, with a slight forward movement. The 'KOMAL CAFE' and Pepsi advertisements remain the primary focus. Traffic and parked auto-rickshaws are visible at the street level.
Continued slight movement along the street. The 'KOMAL CAFE' building facade is still dominant. The cloudy sky provides even, flat lighting.
Steady movement forward. More detail of the street level reveals pedestrians and the base of the traffic signal pole.
The camera continues to pan slowly. The Pepsi advertisements featuring Yash are very clear. The local Kannada script for 'KOMAL CAFE' is prominently displayed.
Passing the corner of the building. The 'KOMAL CAFE' sign is still visible, along with its descriptor: 'SOUTH INDIAN & NORTH INDIAN FAMILY RESTAURANT'.
New shop signs come into view. To the right of Komal Cafe, a sign for 'ASIAN SHAKES & ROLL'S' appears. In the background, a large billboard for 'Mount Litera Zee School' shows a student's face.
Movement past the next building. A large sign for 'ASIAN BAKERY' (Bakers & Confectionery) is visible. Above it is a billboard for 'SRN MEHTA PU COLLEGE'.
Closer view of 'ASIAN BAKERY' with its name in Kannada (ಏಷಿಯನ್ ಬೇಕರಿ). A bright red Coca-Cola banner with the 'Real Magic' slogan sits above the bakery entrance.
Passing 'ASIAN BAKERY'. A new sign for 'HOTEL LOTUS PARK' (LUXURY & COMFORT LIVING) appears on the right, along with 'JP Residency LODGE'.
The camera moves past a sequence of shops. Signs for 'JANATA CREAM PARLOUR' and a large 'ALEEMEE PUBLIC SCHOOL' billboard are visible. Below the school sign is 'DAGA ELECTRICALS'.
Clear view of 'RAJESH MEDICAL HALL' with its name in Kannada (ರಾಜೇಶ ಮೆಡಿಕಲ್ ಹಾಲ್). Above it is a modern building with blue glass windows. 'DAGA ELECTRICALS' is still partially visible.
Passing 'HOTEL GULBARGA RESIDENCY'. Below it is a sign for the 'AAM AADMI PARTY' (ಆಮ್ ಆದ್ಮಿ ಪಾರ್ಟಿ) Kalaburagi South Assembly Office. Pedestrians and auto-rickshaws are visible on the street.
The camera captures an older, unfinished brick building. At the ground level, there are signs for 'Praveen Footwear' (ಪ್ರವೀಣ ಫುಟವೇರ) and a 'MEALS & TIFFIN CENTRE'.

The camera moves past 'AKBAR TOWER'. Signs for 'S.B. MEDICAL HALL' (ಎಸ್. ಬಿ. ಮೆಡಿಕಲ್ ಹಾಲ್), 'SHAH DENTAL CARE', and 'R.K. AQUARIUM & PET SHOP' (ಶ್ರೀ ಆರ್.ಕೆ ಅಕ್ವೇರಿಯಂ & ಪೆಟ್ ಶಾಪ್) are clustered together.
A green building on the left houses 'Jai Bhavani Maratha Khandavali'. To its right is the red 'Dr. S. S. PATIL COMPLEX'. A tea shop named 'Amruthulya' (ಅಮೃತತುಲ್ಯ) is at the ground level.
The camera continues down the street. Signs for 'BALAJI sweets' and 'Apollo Pharmacy' (ಅಪೋಲೋ ಫಾರ್ಮಸಿ) are visible. Overhead wires are dense in this section.
Passing 'DBG POORNIMA WINES' (ಡಿ ಬಿ ಜಿ ಪೂರ್ಣಿಮಾ ವೈನ್ಸ್). Next to it is 'Kumar SHIRTS'. The street is busy with people and vehicles.
Signs for 'Basava Door's & Hardware's' (ಬಸವ ಡೋರ್ಸ್ & ಹಾರ್ಡ್ವೇರ್), 'R.G. PADSHETTY', and 'ALFA COMMUNICATION' (airtel 5G Plus) are visible on this block.
The camera reaches another street corner. Signs for 'BHARAT FOOT WEAR' and 'JANATA' lodge are seen. Dense overhead utility wires crisscross the scene.
Looking down a slightly wider section of the road. On the right, signs for 'VIJAYANAND TRAVELS' (ವಿಜಯಾನಂದ ಟ್ರಾವೆಲ್ಸ್) and 'MOHAN RESTAURANT' (ಮೋಹನ ರೆಸ್ಟೋರೆಂಟ್) are visible.
Close up view of 'MOHAN LODGE' (ಮೋಹನ ಲಾಡ್ಜ್) entrance and the adjacent 'MOHAN RESTAURANT'. Pedestrians are walking on the sidewalk.
The camera pans to the right, showing a multi-story building with decorative lattice patterns on its side. More utility poles and wires are prominent.
The camera is looking forward down the main road. Traffic including auto-rickshaws and a red car is visible. To the left, there's a cluster of blue flags.
A large blue billboard on the right catches the eye. It features the word 'GOLD' in English and Kannada script, likely for a jewelry or textile shop.
Moving closer to a large building on the right. The blue 'GOLD' billboard is still visible. A sign for 'DENTAL CARE HOSPITAL' appears further ahead.
Passing the 'DENTAL CARE HOSPITAL' (ದಂತ ಚಿಕಿತ್ಸಾಲಯ). Below it are shops like 'UNIQUE FOOT WEAR'. The street scene is crowded.
Clear view of 'Dinesh FOOT WEAR' (ದಿನೇಶ ಫುಟವೇರ) and 'SAPTAGIRI OPTICAL' (EYE SPECIALIST). The building above has several levels of commercial space.
Continuing past 'SAPTAGIRI OPTICAL'. Signs for 'EXIDE' batteries, 'TVS EUROGRIP' tires, and 'SAMAY TIME CENTRE' are visible.
The final frame shows 'SAMAY TIME CENTRE' (ಸಮಯ ಟೈಮ್ ಸೆಂಟರ್) and 'Dr. KALE'S CLINIC'. A shop named 'VAZIR ELECTRICALS' is at ground level. The cloudy sky persists.
